productDisplayName: Timberland Men Casual Black Casual Shoes
description: Trendy and comfortable, the timberland 2.0 Euro Sprint shoe comes in a classic design and is packed with features that makes it much more than just a footwear -  a perfect buy for those men who never compromise on comfort and style. This is one classic hiking boot that works great for winter vacations. UpperLeather upper for absolute durability, comfort and styleHi-ankle for comfort and stylePerforated synthetic leather lining along the collar for durability and enhanced ventilationFabric inner lining with a well-padded collar and tongue for ultimate breathable comfortStylish lacing system for a snug, customised Fit Brand on lateral side and tongue for styleMidsoleSmart Comfort Biorhythmic Chassis channels to offer comfort where it's most needed OutsoleDurable rubber outsole with terraced lugs for ultimate grip and tractionOutsole reinforced on the upper as toe box foxing for durabilityShoe careUse a branded leather conditioner and brush to restore shoe shineDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
